mapper.sql: select u.id, u.dept_code as user_dept_code, u.login_name, u.name, u.code, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.password, u.status, u.entry_date, u.leave_date, u.is_deleted, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.pwd_update_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remarks, d.dept_code, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.status as dept_status, r.id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status as role_status from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_code = d.dept_code left join sys_user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id
mapper.select:
select distinct u.id, u.login_name, u.code, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.entry_date, u.leave_date, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_code = d.dept_code left join sys_user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where u.is_deleted = '0' and (r.id != #{roleId} or r.id IS NULL) and u.id not in (select u.id from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id and ur.role_id = #{roleId})
AND u.login_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
${params.dataScope}
select id, login_name from sys_user where login_name = #{userName} and is_deleted = '0' limit 1
select id, phonenumber from sys_user where phonenumber = #{phonenumber} and is_deleted = '0' limit 1
select id, email from sys_user where email = #{email} and is_deleted = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( id, dept_code, login_name, name, code, email, phonenumber, password, status, entry_date, leave_date, pwd_update_date, create_by, remarks, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{deptCode}, #{userName}, #{name}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{phonenumber}, #{password}, #{status}, #{entryDate}, #{leaveDate}, #{pwdUpdateDate}, #{createBy}, #{remarks}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status} where id = #{userId}
update sys_user set avatar = #{avatar} where login_name = #{userName}
update sys_user set pwd_update_date = sysdate(), password = #{password} where login_name = #{userName}
mapper.delete: update sys_user set is_deleted = '2' where id = #{userId}

update sys_user set is_deleted = '2' where id in
#{userId}
